missionFrame.function: Advance the open-world recovery campaign through an authored tactical case.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: When a dead crew returns, which parts of their former life can command restore without taking rights from the living?

forbiddenOutcomes: end Black Current from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
resolve Project Mooring without authored evidence

phases.title: An Intact Signal
phases.summary: Ternion and Sable Verge receive a current-distorted but valid Starfleet identification from the missing U.S.S. Velorum.
pressures: Its crew expects current orders to remain valid
Public traffic is converging on the site
phases.directorPurpose: Ternion and Sable Verge receive a current-distorted but valid Starfleet identification from the missing U.S.S. Velorum.

phases.title: Returned Command
phases.summary: Commander Varen reports twelve elapsed days and requests operational orders, only to learn that seven months have passed.
phases.directorPurpose: Commander Varen reports twelve elapsed days and requests operational orders, only to learn that seven months have passed.

phases.title: The First Manifest
phases.summary: Outside records reveal deaths, remarriages, promotions, benefits, and reassigned commands for the Velorum crew.
objectives: Separate medical, command, family, and property decisions
pressures: Varen wants her ship and crew kept together
phases.directorPurpose: Outside records reveal deaths, remarriages, promotions, benefits, and reassigned commands for the Velorum crew.
playerFacingObjectives: Separate medical, command, family, and property decisions

phases.title: Provisional Status
phases.summary: The player establishes a temporary status for the Velorum, its crew, its command, and its records pending formal review.
pressures: Returnees are observing whether they will be treated as persons or property
phases.directorPurpose: The player establishes a temporary status for the Velorum, its crew, its command, and its records pending formal review.

decisionPoints.title: Public Return Status
decisionPoints.prompt: What provisional legal and command status will Starfleet recognize for the Velorum and its returned crew?
decisionPoints.stakes: Personhood; Ship command; Family contact; Navigation evidence; Regional precedent
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; listed options are examples only.

decisionPoints.title: Navigation Core Custody
decisionPoints.prompt: Who may access or hold the Velorum navigation core while quarantine and command review continue?
decisionPoints.stakes: Mooring evidence; Crew rights; Security pressure
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; listed options are examples only.

commandDecisions.title: Public Return Status
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about public return status.

commandDecisions.title: Navigation Core Custody
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about navigation core custody.
